description_long: This object is a compact, tactical shotgun with a predominantly black finish and a robust, modern design. The body features a textured, ergonomic pistol grip and a prominent trigger guard, with a metallic support bar running beneath the barrel for added stability. The barrel assembly is short and boxy, with a ribbed upper rail that suggests compatibility with tactical accessories such as sights or lights. The front end displays two parallel barrels, indicating a double-barrel configuration, and the overall construction appears to be primarily metal with some polymer components. The shotgun lacks a traditional shoulder stock, instead featuring a pistol grip for one-handed or close-quarters use. Its design is utilitarian and suited for urban tactical scenarios, emphasizing maneuverability and accessory mounting.
description: A compact, tactical double-barrel shotgun with a black finish, ribbed upper rail, and ergonomic pistol grip, lacking a traditional stock. Designed for close-quarters use and accessory compatibility.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length, pistol grip, metallic support bar, ribbed upper rail, and double-barrel front.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the two parallel barrels and the ribbed upper rail, with minimal grip and trigger detail visible.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, showing the grip, support bar, and barrel assembly from the other side.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the back of the grip and the alignment of the upper rail, with the barrels receding from view.
attribute_barrel_configuration: side-by-side double-barrel with ribbed upper rail and short barrel length
attribute_trigger_guard_design: elongated, rounded trigger guard with a slight forward extension and reinforced lower bar
